name: Atlassian for Startups
summary: Atlassian for Startups provides eligible startups with free access to the Premium edition of Atlassian products.
benefits: Jira Product Discovery Premium (up to 10 creator seats and unlimited contributor seats)
Compass Premium (up to 50 full user seats and unlimited basic user seats)
eligibility: Not an existing Atlassian paid customer
VC funded or associated with a partner accelerator and/or incubator
Have not raised more than US$10 million in external funding
